title: 30 Screening and Online versions
wikitext:
[]: 3.0 Screening and Online versions? Post by Stan » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:28 pm So almost 3.5 years ago eva 2.0 released in theaters in Japan (Jun 2009) and now 3.0 is coming half way through November. Since the majority of us don't live in Japan, we have to rely on other methods to watch the movie to avoid waiting a year for subs and 2 years for dubs (roughly). Back then I remember that I watched a raw poorly camcorded version on Megavideo (which no longer exists), it was at like a 45 degree angle and was shaking rather violently, but my dedication and anxiety to see the film helped me ignore the cons and focus on the awesomeness that is Evangelion. A few months later, that same camcorded version was re-uploaded with subs. There is lots of anticipation for 3.0 and in the last 3.5 years the rebuilt of eva got a lot more recognition/exposure so many more people care for the film. I was just wondering if some people will try to do the same now? Realistically speaking, I am sure people will try to "illegally record" the movie in the theater, but my concern is where to actually watch it online. I suspect it will get removed rather quickly from most sites. I will obviously rely on google search, but if anyone has good leads to which website will most likely have a camcorder version please feel free to post below~

[]: Post by Jornophelanthas » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:35 pm Personally, I will not watch the new movie until there is subtitling. I want the full experience, which includes knowing what the characters are saying. So I'm afraid I can't help you.

[]: Post by visionfactory » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:49 pm I don't know where to watch the movie when leaked either, help please!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Nov 06, 2012 2:56 pm The 2.0 rip came at the time of the first overseas showing; the Japanese are rather strictly law-abiding when it comes to this sort of thing, and it had to wait for the Koreans to get a chance. As to where you might find such a thing -- try some of the more scurrilous anime sites, because it won't be here.
